hero.subtitle: Empowering the next generation of blockchain builders in DR Congo through education, incubation, and community.

home.whatSubtitle: A Web3 innovation center dedicated to building blockchain infrastructure and talent in Central Africa.
home.whatDesc: We believe that decentralized technologies can transform communities. Through workshops, hackathons, and project incubation, we're creating a vibrant ecosystem where innovation thrives at the foot of the Nyiragongo volcano.
home.upcomingSubtitle: Join us for workshops, hackathons, and meetups.
home.projectsSubtitle: Innovative solutions built by our community.
home.newsletterSubtitle: Subscribe to our newsletter for the latest Web3 news from Goma.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Discover our mission, vision, and the people driving Web3 innovation in Central Africa.
about.missionDesc: Develop the Web3 ecosystem in Goma and train the next generation of blockchain builders. We provide the tools, education, and community support needed to turn innovative ideas into impactful decentralized solutions.
about.visionDesc: Make Goma a leading center of blockchain innovation in Africa. We envision a thriving ecosystem where local talent creates world-class decentralized solutions that address real challenges.
about.obj1Desc: Comprehensive blockchain education programs for developers and entrepreneurs.
about.obj2Desc: Supporting innovative Web3 projects from ideation to launch.
about.obj3Desc: Connecting builders with mentors, investors, and global communities.
about.obj4Desc: Showcasing local talent and projects on the global blockchain stage.

community.title: Join Our
community.subtitle: Be part of the fastest-growing Web3 community in Central Africa.
community.howSubtitle: Get involved in the UJUZI Labs ecosystem.
community.discordDesc: Connect with builders, ask questions, and collaborate on projects.
community.telegramDesc: Stay updated with announcements and community discussions.
community.attendDesc: Meet the community in person at our workshops and meetups.
community.ambassadorSubtitle: Become part of the core team behind UJUZI Labs Web3.
community.ambassadorDesc: By joining the UJUZI Labs Team, you help organize hub activities, support new members, and contribute to spreading Web3 education across DR Congo. Team members get privileged access to resources, mentorship, and collaboration and funding opportunities.
community.test1: UJUZI Labs gave me the skills and network to launch my first DApp. The community here is incredible!
community.test2: Before UJUZI Labs, blockchain felt impossible to learn. Now I'm building smart contracts!
community.test3: The incubation program helped me turn my idea into a funded project. Forever grateful.

onboarding.title: Onboarding Program
onboarding.subtitle: Helping new members integrate into the UJUZI Labs ecosystem.
onboarding.whatDesc: The Onboarding Program is a structured welcome path that helps new members understand the ecosystem, tools, and opportunities within UJUZI Labs.
onboarding.impactDesc: This program improves member retention, speeds up practical learning, and increases the number of participants who move into real project execution.
onboarding.donateDesc: Your contributions help us fund intro sessions, learning resources, and onboarding support for new participants.
onboarding.storyText: Since 2023, Ujuzi Labs identified a strong need for Web3 education, especially around the Cardano blockchain. This led us to launch this program, through which at the end of each month we mobilize our limited resources and recruit young entrepreneurs, students, and technology enthusiasts to provide a one-week training on topics such as Web3, distributed ledger technology, blockchain, Cardano wallets, and other practical foundations for their journey.

testimonials.title: Participant Testimonials
testimonials.subtitle: Reserved area for feedback from people who joined the program.

onboarding.donateJustification: Your support helps keep this program alive: venue access, internet connectivity, learning materials, learner support, and post-training follow-up. Every contribution, even small, strengthens real impact for local youth.
onboarding.ideaDesc: Do you have a collaboration proposal, sponsorship idea, or concept to build with Ujuzi Labs? You can also suggest improvements to the Onboarding Program, integration of new training topics, and new practical activities. Share your idea through our form.
onboarding.cryptoHow: Connect your Cardano wallet, choose the amount you want to contribute, then confirm the transaction. Once validated, your contribution will support upcoming cohorts.

donateForm.mobileHelp: Fill in the details below to complete your donation via Mobile Money.

errors.requiredFields: Please provide name, email, and phone.

success.paymentConfirmed: Payment confirmed. Thank you for your contribution.

success.cryptoThanks: Thank you for your contribution. Our team will verify the on-chain transaction.

mtidano.heroSubtitle: Reforestation + blockchain for transparent, traceable, and sustainable environmental impact.
mtidano.presentationP1: MTIDANO NFT is an initiative that combines reforestation and blockchain technology to create a transparent, traceable, and sustainable environmental management model. The project relies on a simple principle: each planted tree is represented by a dynamic NFT, linking a digital asset to real-world impact.
mtidano.presentationP2: This approach turns ecological actions into measurable, accessible, and verifiable assets.
mtidano.moreDetails: See more details about MTIDANO NFTree
mtidano.missionVisionP1: MTIDANO NFT's mission is to help restore degraded ecosystems, fight soil erosion, promote sustainable reforestation, improve transparency in environmental projects, and encourage participation through blockchain.
mtidano.missionVisionP2: The project aims to become a reference for integrating Web3 technology into environmental action, with a replicable model that can be tracked, funded, and scaled globally.
mtidano.nftreeStep1: Plant trees in areas vulnerable to water erosion in North and South Kivu.
mtidano.nftreeStep2: Accurately geolocate each tree using GPS coordinates with KoboToolbox.
mtidano.nftreeStep4: Associate data with a dynamic NFT that evolves over time.
mtidano.nftreeStep5: Ensure transparent monitoring by holders and local project partners.
mtidano.impactIntro: MTIDANO NFT already delivers concrete field results across multiple intervention zones (Bweremana, Shasha, Kiluku, Mukwidja, Kirotshe, Rueni, etc.).
mtidano.operationsP1: The project relies on close collaboration between environmental teams, technical teams, and local communities, using a hybrid value model that combines real ecological impact with blockchain innovation.
mtidano.operationsP2: Main activities: reforestation, erosion control, nursery setup, environmental awareness, forest stewardship, and publishing tree-linked NFTs on
